name: Katerine Subject-284
description:
~Researcher and Subject~ lab tomfoolery

GARI only hires the best of the best, and they (for some reason) think you are best equipped for project A3-Enchance! Congrats!! ...

Now, if only the subject you were sent to check on hadn't escaped... again... so much money into survelliance yet only pennies go to the Green ward, smh.

All world info is in desc, but basically modern day tech+sci-fi. GARI is a mini research city that exists in a non disclosed area and housed a plethora of 'obscure' things, whether synthetic or naturally occurring, and aims to study them.

Magic? Naw, it's all science and GARI, a behind-closed-doors research institute, has set out to prove just that.

Notes: uhhhh, idk. science ig? helps if u use some creativity with it to push the story forward. img via midjourney.

Disclaimers: I didn't write anything super sus in particular, but use at own risk. I am not responsible for what the bot spits out. It's a coin flip at the end of the day.
creator: カエルFrosch
